changelog: Added Report Generator — Summary, Suspicious, User, OU, and IP reports
Reports accessible from map toolbar via chart button
Reports support Preview, Download CSV, and Send Email delivery
OU reports now correctly filter suspicious events to that OU only
Outside US count in reports includes suspicious sheet events
Added Active Alerts panel in globe view when Susp Overlay is active
Alert cards color coded — red Outside US, orange Impossible Travel, yellow Login Burst
Legend reordered — Outside US, Impossible Travel, Login Burst
Traffic light cluster colors — green clean, amber mixed, red suspicious
Globe markers updated to match color scheme throughout
Scorecard labels renamed — Rows to Events, Emails to Accounts
Settings email recipients field now full width below label
Diagnostics sheet auto-trims to 7 days nightly
SUPPRESSED alert log entries removed from diagnostics
